title: Mint Investment Awards 2026: HDFC's Aditya Puri, Bharti Airtel win top honours

descriptionEn: Bac Ninh electronics manufacturer seeks Chinese 21700/18650 lithium battery PACK supplier. UL/IEC certified, 50K+/month supply, Vietnam export experience preferred.

title: 釜山显示器件商寻求中国OLED面板供应商合作
titleEn: Busan Display Company Seeks China OLED Panel Supplier
description: 釜山某显示器件贸易商，正在为韩国某电视品牌寻找OLED面板供应商。要求中国面板厂商产品，品质达A规，可提供技术支持和退换货服务。
descriptionEn: Busan display trading company seeks OLED panel supplier for Korean TV brand. Chinese panel manufacturers preferred, Grade A quality, technical support and return policy required.

title: 印尼电池回收企业寻求中国锂电池回收处理设备
titleEn: Indonesian Battery Recycler Seeks China Lithium Battery Recycling Equipment
description: 印尼某电池回收和处理企业，正在建设锂电池回收产线，寻求中国锂电池回收设备（破碎、分选、湿法冶金）供应商。要求有印尼项目案例，设备成熟稳定。
descriptionEn: Indonesian battery recycling company building lithium battery recycling line seeks Chinese equipment (crushing, sorting, hydrometallurgy). Indonesia project references and proven equipment required.

title: 卡拉奇医药进口商寻求中国制剂设备合资合作
titleEn: Karachi Pharma Importer Seeks China Formulation Equipment Joint Venture
description: 巴基斯坦卡拉奇某医药进口商，计划在巴基斯坦建立口服固体制剂（片剂、胶囊）生产线，寻求中国制药设备商合资合作。要求设备符合PIC/S标准，有巴基斯坦或南亚项目案例优先。
descriptionEn: Karachi pharma importer planning oral solid dosage (tablet, capsule) production line in Pakistan seeks JV with Chinese pharma equipment maker. PIC/S compliant equipment, Pakistan/South Asia references preferred.

title: 雅加达建材分销商寻求中国瓷砖和卫浴产品进口代理
titleEn: Jakarta Building Material Distributor Seeks China Tiles & Sanitary Ware Agency
description: 印尼雅加达某建材分销商，正在扩大产品线，寻求中国瓷砖、卫浴五金和厨房台面制造商的印尼市场代理权。要求有印尼SNI认证，产品设计符合东南亚审美。
descriptionEn: Jakarta building material distributor seeks China tiles, sanitary ware and kitchen countertop manufacturers agency for Indonesia. SNI certified, Southeast Asian design aesthetic required.

title: 东京自动化设备商寻求中国协作机器人（cobots）进口代理
titleEn: Tokyo Automation Company Seeks China Collaborative Robot Import Agency
description: 东京某工厂自动化集成商，寻求中国协作机器人（cobot）制造商的产品代理权。要求产品安全认证齐全（CE/UL），支持开放API，已有在日实际应用案例优先。
descriptionEn: Tokyo factory automation integrator seeks agency for Chinese collaborative robot (cobot) manufacturers. CE/UL certified, open API support, existing Japan use cases preferred.

title: 胡志明市服装品牌寻求中国功能性面料供应商
titleEn: HCMC Fashion Brand Seeks China Functional Fabric Supplier
description: 越南时尚运动服装品牌，寻求中国供应商运动功能性面料（吸湿排汗、抗UV、抗菌）。要求有OEKO-TEX认证，月供货量10万米以上，有越南服装品牌合作记录优先。
descriptionEn: Vietnamese sportswear brand seeks Chinese functional fabrics (moisture-wicking, UV-protective, antibacterial). OEKO-TEX certified, 100K+ meters/month, Vietnamese apparel brand experience preferred.

title: 新加坡寻求中国冷链物流设备进口代理
titleEn: Singapore Seeks China Cold Chain Equipment Import Agency
description: 新加坡某冷链物流解决方案提供商，寻求中国冷链设备和冷藏车制造商的东南亚代理权。要求产品符合新加坡SLS标准，有ISO认证，已有食品冷链应用案例。
descriptionEn: Singapore cold chain logistics provider seeks China cold chain equipment and refrigerated vehicle manufacturers agency for Southeast Asia. SLS standard, ISO certified, food cold chain experience required.

title: 槟城医疗器械商寻求中国一次性耗材OEM合作
titleEn: Penang Medical Device Company Seeks China Disposable Supplies OEM
description: 马来西亚槟城某医疗器械公司，希望寻找中国一次性医疗耗材（注射器、输液袋、敷料）制造商进行OEM合作。要求FDA或CE认证，可定制包装，有英语说明书。
descriptionEn: Penang medical device company seeks China disposable medical supplies (syringes, IV bags, wound dressings) OEM partner. FDA/CE certified, custom packaging, English instructions required.
companyName: 绿光医疗科技 马来西亚

title: 金边制衣企业寻求中国智能缝纫设备和MES系统供应商
titleEn: Phnom Penh Garment Factory Seeks China Smart Sewing Equipment & MES Supplier
description: 柬埔寨金边某成衣制造企业，计划升级自动化产线，寻求中国智能缝纫机（带激光裁剪）和MES制造执行系统供应商。要求设备耐用、适合东南亚气候，有柬埔寨服装工厂案例优先。
descriptionEn: Phnom Penh garment factory upgrading automation lines seeks China smart sewing machines (with laser cutting) and MES system suppliers. Durable equipment suitable for Southeast Asian climate, Cambodia garment factory references preferred.
companyNameEn: Phnom Penh Garment Import Export Co.

title: 马尼拉电子制造服务商寻求中国SMT贴片机设备供应商

description: 菲律宾马尼拉某电子制造服务商（EMS），寻求中国SMT贴片机（AOI检测设备）供应商。要求设备精度在01005以上，有菲律宾或东南亚项目案例，可提供培训和本地维护。
descriptionEn: Manila EMS company seeks Chinese SMT placement and AOI equipment. Accuracy 01005 and above, Philippines/SEA references, training and local maintenance required.

descriptionEn: Vientiane agriculture company planning organic tea cultivation and deep processing project seeks China tea planting equipment (irrigation, fertilization) and tea processing equipment. Organic certification support, planting technology training required.

descriptionEn: Thai rubber food packaging exporter seeks China organic rubber raw material supplier. Organic certification (EU or NOP), food-grade standard, Thai FDA and destination country compliance required.
